name: STG · INFRA · Schedule → Operator Health Check Self Test Ping · ANS
description: INFRA | Runs every 15 min. Pings 19 operator endpoints (core + 15 subagents), measures response time, marks down if timeout or no response, Slack alerts on failures, bulk-logs all results to Supabase health_checks. OWNER: Ansh | p1:high | ENV: STG

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow_name: 'STG · INFRA · Schedule → Operator Health Check Self Test Ping · ANS', error_message: $json.error.message, error_node: $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted, execution_id: $execution.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
